trl_1.title: Basic Principles Observed
trl_1.description: Basic principles observed and reported. Scientific research begins to be translated into applied research and development.

trl_2.title: Technology Concept Formulated
trl_2.description: Technology concept and/or application formulated. Invention begins, but no proof or detailed analysis is available.

trl_3.title: Experimental Proof of Concept
trl_3.description: Active research and development initiated. Analytical and experimental proof of concept obtained.

trl_4.title: Component Validation in Laboratory
trl_4.description: Component and/or breadboard validation in laboratory environment. Low-fidelity system assembled and tested.

trl_5.title: Component Validation in Relevant Environment
trl_5.description: Component and/or breadboard validation in relevant environment. Significantly increases fidelity of breadboard technology.

trl_6.title: System/Subsystem Model in Relevant Environment
trl_6.description: System/subsystem model or prototype demonstration in a relevant environment. Representative model or prototype system tested.

trl_7.title: System Prototype in Operational Environment
trl_7.description: System prototype demonstration in an operational environment. Prototype tested in actual operational conditions.

trl_8.title: Actual System Completed and Qualified
trl_8.description: Actual system completed and qualified through test and demonstration. Technology proven to work in final form.

trl_9.title: Actual System Proven in Operational Environment
trl_9.description: Actual system proven through successful mission operations. Technology in routine operational use.
